mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in the federal funds rate above 5% signals a tightening monetary cycle that raises discount rates, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where FEDFUNDS exceeds 4.99%, or the Rank IC falls below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent growth in nonfarm payrolls above 100k signals strong labor market demand, boosting corporate earnings and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 40% of periods with PAYEMS growth exceeding 100k, or the Rank IC falls below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production and housing starts indicates robust supply-side expansion, driving corporate output and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns when both INDPRO and HOUST exceed their respective thresholds, or the interaction effect's t-statistic falls below 1.96 in 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Strong GDP growth above 3% annualized signals sustained demand expansion, boosting corporate revenues and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns during late-cycle expansion phases.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns during periods of GDPC1 growth > 3%, or the regime-specific Rank IC falls below 0.05 in 2-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in industrial production below 100 signals weakening supply-side capacity, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days as investors price in recession risks.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns when INDPRO falls below 100, or the Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 1-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly rise in CPI above 2% signals inflationary pressures that prompt monetary tightening, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns despite CPIAUCSL exceeding 2%, or the Rank IC falls below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the unemployment rate below 4.5% signals a tight labor market, increasing wage pressures and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns when UNRATE falls below 4.5%, or the Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 1-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in residential sales above 360k signals strong housing demand, boosting construction activity and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns despite RSAFS growth exceeding 360k, or the Rank IC falls below 0.04 over any 3-year rolling window.
